description: Email contains a bare 25% growth projection in 12 months with no assumptions or basis — should fail ADV-004.
text:
FarmThru shareholder update — pre-raise edition.

We project 25% growth over the next 12 months. We project our customer base will double by mid-2027. We expect to be profitable in FY28.

If those numbers excite you as much as they excite us, our crowd-sourced funding round opens on Birchal on 23 June 2026.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
